verses.text: David extols the LORD for lifting him up, healing him, and bringing his soul up from the grave. He has been rescued from death's door. The God who hears our cry can raise us from the lowest depths.
David extols the LORD for lifting him up, healing him, and bringing his soul up from the grave. He has been rescued from death's door. The God who hears our cry can raise us from the lowest depths.
David extols the LORD for lifting him up, healing him, and bringing his soul up from the grave. He has been rescued from death's door. The God who hears our cry can raise us from the lowest depths.

He calls the saints to sing, for God's anger is but a moment and His favour lifelong: 'weeping may endure for a night, but joy cometh in the morning.' Sorrow has its night, but it ends. God's mercy outlasts His brief chastening.

He calls the saints to sing, for God's anger is but a moment and His favour lifelong: 'weeping may endure for a night, but joy cometh in the morning.' Sorrow has its night, but it ends. God's mercy outlasts His brief chastening.

In ease David had said he would never be moved, but when God hid His face he was troubled. Prosperity bred false security. God sometimes withdraws comfort to teach us that our strength is in Him alone.

In ease David had said he would never be moved, but when God hid His face he was troubled. Prosperity bred false security. God sometimes withdraws comfort to teach us that our strength is in Him alone.
He cried to the LORD, pleading that no profit lay in his death, and begged for mercy and help. He reasoned and prayed earnestly. The afflicted soul may spread its very arguments before God.
He cried to the LORD, pleading that no profit lay in his death, and begged for mercy and help. He reasoned and prayed earnestly. The afflicted soul may spread its very arguments before God.
He cried to the LORD, pleading that no profit lay in his death, and begged for mercy and help. He reasoned and prayed earnestly. The afflicted soul may spread its very arguments before God.

God turned his mourning into dancing, that his heart might sing praise and not be silent; so he will give thanks for ever. Grief became gladness. The end of God's deliverances is that His people praise Him without ceasing.

God turned his mourning into dancing, that his heart might sing praise and not be silent; so he will give thanks for ever. Grief became gladness. The end of God's deliverances is that His people praise Him without ceasing.
